name: list_specs
description: List all specs in the current project

name: get_spec
description: Fetch a single persisted Aura spec by ID

spec_id.description: UUID of the spec to fetch.

name: create_spec
description: Create a new persisted Aura spec in the current project

title.description: Short human-readable title for the spec.

markdown_contents.description: Full markdown body of the spec. Must follow the structured spec content contract: contains the sections `## Background / Context`, `## Goals`, `## Non-Goals`, `## Affected Files & Modules` (concrete repo paths), `## Interfaces & Signatures` (current and proposed shape pasted verbatim from source when modifying existing code), `## Design / Approach`, `## External References` (URLs / RFC sections, or `None`), and `## Definition of Done` (exact build/test/format/lint commands plus 3-7 acceptance criteria). Inspect the repo before authoring so the file paths and signatures are real.

name: update_spec
description: Update an existing persisted Aura spec

spec_id.description: UUID of the spec to update.

markdown_contents.description: Optional replacement markdown body. If supplied, it must follow the structured spec content contract: `## Background / Context`, `## Goals`, `## Non-Goals`, `## Affected Files & Modules`, `## Interfaces & Signatures`, `## Design / Approach`, `## External References`, and `## Definition of Done`.

name: delete_spec
description: Delete an existing persisted Aura spec

spec_id.description: UUID of the spec to delete.

name: list_tasks
description: List persisted Aura tasks in the current project

spec_id.description: Optional spec UUID to filter tasks to a single spec.

name: get_task
description: Fetch a single persisted Aura task by ID

task_id.description: UUID of the task to fetch.

name: create_task
description: Create a persisted Aura task under an existing project spec

spec_id.description: UUID of the parent spec from list_specs.

title.description: Short human-readable title for the task.

description.description: Full task description. The executor agent that runs this task may not re-open the parent spec, so the description must be self-contained and must follow the structured task content contract: contains the sections `## Goal` (1-2 sentences), `## Context` (quote 1-3 lines from the parent spec verbatim), `## Files & Symbols` (concrete repo paths plus function/type/test names; never invent paths), `## Approach` (for implementation work: inspect, call `submit_plan`, then `write_file` / `edit_file` / `delete_file`), `## Acceptance Criteria` (3-5 observable bullets), and `## Verification` (exact build/test/format/lint commands from the parent spec's Definition of Done; for no-source-edit tasks, instruct the executor to call `task_done` with `no_changes_needed: true`).

dependency_ids.description: Optional task UUIDs this task depends on.

name: update_task
description: Update an existing persisted Aura task

task_id.description: UUID of the task to update.

description.description: Optional replacement description. If supplied, it must follow the structured task content contract: `## Goal`, `## Context` (quoting the parent spec), `## Files & Symbols`, `## Approach`, `## Acceptance Criteria`, and `## Verification`.

name: delete_task
description: Delete an existing persisted Aura task

task_id.description: UUID of the task to delete.

spec_id.description: UUID of the parent spec for parity with shared task tool semantics.

name: transition_task
description: Transition a persisted Aura task to a new workflow status

task_id.description: UUID of the task to update.

status.description: Target task status, such as ready, in_progress, done, blocked, or failed.

name: retry_task
description: Retry a failed or blocked Aura task by returning it to ready

task_id.description: UUID of the task to retry.

name: run_task
description: Trigger execution of a single Aura task by the project dev loop

task_id.description: UUID of the task to run.

name: get_project
description: Fetch the current Aura project details

name: update_project
description: Update the current Aura project metadata or commands

name: get_project_stats
description: Fetch aggregate stats for the current Aura project

name: start_dev_loop
description: Start the Aura project dev loop

name: pause_dev_loop
description: Pause the Aura project dev loop

name: stop_dev_loop
description: Stop the Aura project dev loop

name: get_loop_status
description: Fetch the current Aura project dev-loop status
